message:
fix(diagnostics): include epoch and per-severity/per-category counts in DiagnosticEmitter content hash

Add epoch, per-severity counts (sev:{k}={v}), and per-category counts
(cat:{k}={v}) to the DiagnosticEmitter content string used for hashing,
preventing two reports with different breakdowns from producing the same hash.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
